raw_description:
Elegant Accommodations:Rooms feature sea or city views, air-conditioning, balconies, and private bathrooms with free WiFi. Amenities include bathrobes, minibars, and soundproofing.Exceptional Facilities:Guests enjoy spa facilities, a swimming pool with a view, fitness centre, and a lush garden. Additional services include yoga and fitness classes, beauty treatments, and a kids' club.Dining Experience:The family-friendly restaurant offers Italian, Mediterranean, Middle Eastern, and international cuisines. Dining options include brunch, lunch, dinner, and high tea.Prime Location:Located in Doha, the hotel is 3.5 km from Lagoona Mall and 7 km from Qatar International Exhibition Centre. Nearby attractions include Doha Golf Club and Qatar National Museum.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.5for a two-person trip.

Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Raffles Doha. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
